calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR. Continued in error.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Sep-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Justin Peter Hedemark, Esq. appearing representing WWA Wendy Lynn Santiago, Administrator.

Petitioner to comply with 27875(a). Report of Operation of Law or Intra-Familial Firearm Transaction to be filed.

Status of filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or a Report of Status and Petitioner for Additional Time to Administer the Estate is continued to Sep-23-2026 at 09:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Justin Hedemark for administrator Wendy Lynn Santiago (via Zoom).

The matter was called for Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Hedemark reported that the final inventory and appraisal had been submitted for filing and that a petition for final distribution is forthcoming. He stated that administration had been delayed due to the death of a beneficiary and the need to identify and appoint that beneficiary's successors, which has now been completed. He further reported that he is awaiting information from a CPA regarding a reserve for taxes and costs before filing the petition.

Mr. Hedemark requested a brief continuance.

The Court continued the matter to June 1, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Continued To Mar-30-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Justin Hedemark for petitioner, Wendy Lynn Santiago (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on status on close of estate.

Mr. Hedemark reported that there had been a delay in the administration due to issues with the probate referee, but that the final inventory and appraisal had recently been received and would be filed shortly. He further stated that a beneficiary, Michael Saxon, had passed away during the administration while residing in England, and that proceedings were underway to appoint a legal representative for his estate. He reported that once a legal representative is appointed, the estate would be in a position to proceed toward final distribution.

The Court continued the matter to March 30, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-22-2025 Continued To Dec-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: none.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 27, 1999, is admitted to probate. Wendy Lynn Santiago is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for December 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Dec-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
